creator: robbelics@gmail.com
text:
Gimp program opens and many of the tools appear to work but if I try to open an image file with File > Open, Gimp hangs and I must ctrl-C to get it to close. Gimp starts with this in the console:

GEGL-geglmodule.c-Message: Module '/usr/local/lib/gegl-0.2/ff-load.so' load error: /usr/local/lib/gegl-0.2/ff-load.so: Undefined symbol "av_read_packet"
